response.justification: Strong systems engineer with active Staff-level experience building AI-agent infrastructure and proven distributed systems expertise at scale. Major concern: Python is explicitly a must-have skill but does not appear on the resume despite listing 8+ other languages. The 15-year tenure at one company demonstrates ownership but raises questions about exposure to high-growth environments. Interview should verify Python proficiency and operational/incident-response depth.
strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Staff level—directly aligned with role's AI-native context and agentic code generation focus
Deep distributed systems expertise from managing microservices handling millions of requests/second with low-latency async I/O and high-performance caching
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentoring, curriculum design, open-source projects, and conference talks spanning 30+ years of software development
concerns: Python is listed as a must-have technical skill but does not appear on resume despite listing 8+ other programming languages
Limited explicit evidence of operational readiness, on-call experience, or incident response capability in production environments at scale
15-year tenure at single company may indicate limited recent exposure to high-growth or frontier-technology company environments and pace

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent infrastructure and framework development
Distributed systems and high-throughput architecture experience
